title: Prediction
description: AI-generated predictive maintenance forecast from Baker Hughes BHC3 AI Suite.

assetId.description: Identifier of the asset this prediction applies to.

failureProbability.description: Probability of failure in the next prediction window (0.0 to 1.0).

estimatedTimeToFailure.description: Estimated time until failure expressed as ISO 8601 duration (e.g., P7D for 7 days).

confidenceScore.description: Model confidence in this prediction (0.0 to 1.0).

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when this prediction was generated.
